channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large crumbling grove in middle of Up Hatherley Way/Shurdington Roundabout, 19th April
item.description:
Large crumbling grove in middle of Up Hatherley Way/Shurdington Roundabout Reported via a resident. Other large potholes on this roundabout as well without white paint - please inspect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Tamarisk Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised utilities ironwork on pavement opposite 8 Justicia Way, 19th April
item.description:
Raised utilities ironwork on pavement opposite 8 Justicia Way Raised by resident. Poses trip hazard for those crossing the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Justicia Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Severely Overgrown Vegetation - Unable to Access PROW, 19th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Oxenton, Tewkesbury

item.title: Road closed barriers, 19th April
item.description:
The road closed barriers have been left for days uncollected on Newcourt Road between the Charlton Close junction and Bafford Lane junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Bafford Lane, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Damming of brook, 19th April
item.description:
Kids playing in the brook are creating heavy dams with large logs, bricks, bits of old furniture and a shopping trolley. This brook is a flood defence for neighbouring estates

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nicolson Close, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gatepost still rotten. Gate could easily fall on a child., 19th April
item.description:
Junction of footpath AOX17 and road. W3W bespoke.continued.serves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxenton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging on bin Winston Churchill Memorial Garden, 19th April
item.description:
Tagging with blue paint on bin nearest Market St entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped tyre Winston Churchill Memorial Garden, 19th April
item.description:
Tyre round the back of the Mission, opposite the entrance to the play area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bolster Winston Churchill Memorial Garden, 19th April
item.description:
Bolster / mattress under tree in Winston Churchill Garden If you come in from the High St, go to the right of the Mission building and it’s just inside the park there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trapped birds - welfare issue, 19th April
item.description:
Pigeons getting stuck in the netting . There's a couple alive and stuck and several already dead and hanging in the nets. It needs fixing or removing. It's horrible to see dead birds hanging from the bridges and worse seeing others that will have a slow death as they can't escape

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Swindon Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping multiple items side of 89 St Paul’s Road, 19th April
item.description:
Albert lane up the side of 89 St Paul’s Road. Multiple items including cot, single mattress, cardboard packaging.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheel dumped?, 19th April
item.description:
Wheel left abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole, 19th April
item.description:
All drivers are forced to drive over the pothole which covers a whole lane of the junction. This is made worse due to the roadworks and needs immediate attention. There are also potholes across the road. Specifically at the junction from Brockworth business park towards A417.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes on kidnappers lane, 18th April
item.description:
Near the entrance to Lotts Meadow. Huge potholes that could cause serious vehicle and tyre damage causing huge expenses to motorists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 smaller potholes end of 61 Apple Orchard plus loads on roads around nr no, 18th April
item.description:
3 smaller potholes end of 61 Apple Orchard and loads more on roads around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Apple Orchard, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really deep pothole destroyed my cars shock absorber, 18th April
item.description:
Outside 8 pensylvania Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2;4;6;8;10;12, Lygon Walk, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights out ahain, 18th April
item.description:
No street lights ( more than 4 ) are working in Midwinter Avenue once again !! This is actually classed as an emergency on your reporting page so hopefully will be fixed ASAP as having to walk with NO street lights is not safe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 18th April
item.description:
Outside 43/45 Farmington Road, Benhall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Farmington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
